home.title: Welcome to Localization Research
home.desc: This application demonstrates a custom algorithmic localization system with LRU caching. Explore different screens to experience the performance benefits.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your app experience
settings.info: Configure your application preferences using our custom localization engine. Change language, adjust display settings, and manage your experience.
settings.notifications_desc: Receive updates about new features and research findings.
settings.biometric_desc: Use fingerprint or face recognition to secure your app.
settings.auto_sync_desc: Automatically sync your data across all devices.

about.title: Localization Research Project
about.overview_desc: This application is part of a comprehensive research project comparing different localization methods in Flutter. This version implements a custom Algorithmic Localization Engine featuring dynamic loading and LRU caching for optimal runtime performance.
about.tech_stack_desc: Built with a custom Localization Engine. Strings are loaded dynamically from JSON files and cached using a LinkedHashMap-based LRU algorithm to minimize redundant lookups and memory footprint.
about.flutter_sdk_desc: Latest stable version with Material 3 design
about.feature_multi_lang_desc: Full support for English, Sinhala, and Tamil languages.
about.feature_lru_desc: Intelligent cache management for faster resource retrieval.
about.feature_runtime_desc: Seamless language switching with immediate UI updates.
about.feature_dynamic_desc: Loads only the necessary translation modules to save memory.
about.feature_performance_desc: Designed for high-speed lookups in large-scale applications.
